prompt: I have about 50 PDF invoices scattered across my Downloads folder from various vendors (Acme Corp, TechSupply Inc, etc.). I need to organize them in my MEGA encrypted vault by vendor name, then create a shareable link to the vendor folders so I can send them to my accountant. Walk me through the exact steps.

assertions.name: includes_mega_ls_or_find_command
assertions.description: Response includes commands to search/list invoices in MEGA (mega-find or mega-ls)

assertions.name: includes_folder_creation
assertions.description: Response includes mega-mkdir command to create vendor folders

assertions.name: includes_bulk_upload_mega_put
assertions.description: Response mentions mega-put -c for efficient bulk upload

assertions.name: includes_share_link_creation
assertions.description: Response includes mega-export -a -f to create shareable links

assertions.name: mentions_local_organization_first
assertions.description: Response recommends organizing files locally before uploading (best practice)

assertions.name: includes_verification_step
assertions.description: Response includes verification that links work before sharing
